todayTasks: Complete dvc.yaml with all stages: download_hmtdb, download_ncbi, download_variants, preprocess, build_vocabulary, pretrain_phase1, pretrain_phase2, finetune_haplogroup, evaluate
Each stage must have deps, outs, params, and metrics defined correctly
The evaluate stage writes reports/eval_summary.json as a DVC metric so dvc metrics show gives final numbers
Reproducibility test: git clone repo, uv sync, dvc repro — full pipeline from raw data to evaluation metrics
